title: FreshFix
description: Fixes the models of the new mob variants for fresh animations!!
body:
Fresh Fix V 1.0 Release!!

Are you using the fantastic 'Fresh Animations' resource pack but finding that the textures are glitched in the latest Minecraft update (1.21.5), especially with the new mob variants? This resource pack provides a crucial fix to ensure that all the beautiful animations from 'Fresh Animations' display correctly in version 1.21.5.

Specifically, this patch addresses texture issues affecting the new mob variants introduced in 1.21.5. Additionally, it includes fixes for texture glitches related to villagers and mooshrooms, ensuring a seamless and visually appealing experience with 'Fresh Animations' across the board.

If you're a fan of the lively and immersive mob animations offered by 'Fresh Animations' and want to enjoy them without any graphical glitches in the newest Minecraft version, then this fix is essential for you!"

Heres a video going over the fixes: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dczHds36jqQ&lc=UgwaAnMS200NIJpR7Bx4AaABAg
